title: ChatGPT reaches 900M weekly active users
description: OpenAI shared the new numbers as part of its announcement that it has raised $110 billion in private funding.

title: AI music generator Suno hits 2M paid subscribers and $300M in annual recurring revenue
description: Suno lets users create music using natural language prompts, making it possible for people with little experience to generate audio with little effort.

title: Apple and Netflix team up to air Formula 1 Canadian Grand Prix
description: As Netflix continues its live sports push, the company has partnered with Apple to air the Formula 1 Canadian Grand Prix.

title: Perplexity’s new Computer is another bet that users need many AI models
description: Perplexity Computer, in the company’s words, "unifies every current AI capability into a single system."

title: Pokémon Winds and Pokémon Waves are coming to the Nintendo Switch 2 in 2027
description: The tenth generation starter Pokémon were revealed in the trailer: Browt (a grass bird), Pombon (a fire puppy), and Gecqua (a water gecko).

title: Employees at Google and OpenAI support Anthropic’s Pentagon stand in open letter
description: While Anthropic has an existing partnership with the Pentagon, the AI company has remained firm that its technology not be used for mass domestic surveillance or fully autonomous weaponry.

title: CISA replaces acting director after a bumbling year on the job
description: The U.S. cybersecurity agency's acting director Madhu Gottumukkala will be replaced, after a year of cuts, layoffs, and staff reassignments, and allegations of security lapses and claims he struggled to lead the agency.

title: After Zomato, Deepinder Goyal returns with a $54M brain-monitoring bet
description: Zomato co-founder Deepinder Goyal's new wearable startup Temple has raised $54 million in a friends-and-family round at a post-money valuation of about $190 million.

title: OpenAI raises $110B in one of the largest private funding rounds in history
description: The new funding consists of a $50 billion investment from Amazon as well as $30 billion each from Nvidia and SoftBank, against a $730 billion valuation.

title: Plaid valued at $8B in employee share sale
description: The new valuation is a 31% increase from $6.1 billion Plaid reached in April.

title: Anthropic CEO stands firm as Pentagon deadline looms
description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said Thursday that he "cannot in good conscience accede" to the Pentagon's demands to give the military unrestricted access to its AI systems.

title: Google paid startup Form Energy $1B for its massive 100-hour battery
description: The deal paves the way for Form Energy to raise a new funding round before potentially going public next year.

title: AI vs. the Pentagon: killer robots, mass surveillance, and red lines
OpenAI snags $110 billion in investments from Amazon, Nvidia, and Softbank
